---
title: "Building and maintaining a Bioconductor package: a practical guide"
description: |
  TALK DESCRIPTION
author:
  - name: Ossama Edbali
    url: URL
date: 2026-04-21
categories:
  - bioconductor
image: "../../images/logo_rug.png"
draft: false
lightbox: true # N.B. need blank line between photos for this to work
---

## Overview

## Event details

**Date:** 2026-04-21

**Time:** 15:00

**Location:** Elm House

**Teams**: [TEAMS LINK](url)

## About the speaker

## Resources

- [Slides](Building_and_Maintaining_a_Bioconductor_Package.pdf)

## Photos

-->
